# canSendWriteWithoutResponse

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the remote device can send a write without a response.

## Declaration

```swift
var canSendWriteWithoutResponse: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

If this value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], flushing all current writes sets the value to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true]. This also results in a call to the delegate’s [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBPeripheralDelegate/peripheralIsReady(toSendWriteWithoutResponse:)].

## Monitoring a Peripheral’s Connection State

- **state**: The connection state of the peripheral.
- **CBPeripheralState**: Values representing the connection state of a peripheral.
